name: file_converter
description: Convert file content between formats. Supports CSV, TSV, JSON, PDF, HTML, Markdown, XLSX, and XML. Returns structured data agents can parse. Binary formats (PDF, XLSX) must be base64-encoded.

content.description: The file content to convert. For text formats (CSV, JSON, HTML, etc.) send raw text. For binary formats (PDF, XLSX) send base64-encoded content.
